VIEW PRODUCTS Shop Restaurant Sign Products A-Frame Signs What better eatery signage than a product that is also known as a “sandwich board”. The A-frame sign setup is arguably one of the best, and most versatile custom display options possible. Use them indoors and outdoors, and also easily swap out the messaging. Learn More Rectangle Flags This flag offers the largest printing surface area of all the custom flag options. This feature allows you to display full length graphics, logos and text on one flag. They have an outdoor durability lifespan of up to 3-6 months. Learn More Fence Banners This option works great for summer food trucks at the ballpark! They can also advertise for yummy corn dog stands at the county fair, or drive-in movie theater popcorn. These signage options are weather-resistant and printed in full color, with digital precision. Learn More Vinyl Banners These custom vinyl banners are the peanut butter and jelly of the signage world. They’re common, yet popular and work well for food advertisements, community outreach and fundraisers. They are printed in full color, on hardy and weather resistant vinyl banner material. Learn More Magnetic Signs Do you have a new menu item or special to offer? Then try mobile and removable sign advertising to boost your visibility. This also works well for delivery businesses that already use fleet vehicles — just add some magnets. Learn More Sintra Signs Sintra is an excellent indoor, directional sign material. You can guide customers to the POS, powder room or soda fountains. Full color foody pics and other images can also enhance the ambiance for your guests. Learn More Banner Retractor Displays Banner displays are perfect for temporary signage, and they’re easy to pack-up, store and reposition. They come in a variety of sizes, and work excellently at trade shows. The banners are printed in full color on premium materials. Retractable banners offer great versatility and high visibility. Learn More Business Cards You don't really know where your business card will wind up. It could be in the hands of an investor interested in new cuisine endeavors, or a hard-working single mom that needs a waitressing job. Learn More Styrene Signs Like a gymnast, this sign option is sturdy yet flexible. It can be used indoors and outdoors for decoration, educational purposes, menus or general information. Learn More Banner Frames Unique, yet sturdy frames are designed to endure extreme weather while protecting your banner. You can easily swap out or replace the banner in minutes. Indoor and Outdoor Uses Most of our restaurant signs can be used both indoors as well as outdoors — you can even hand out business cards in the park or at the fair. Fence banners in the mesh banner material option work very well in super windy locations. This material is equipped with holes in it that allow maximum airflow, and helps the material not to tear. Great for Directional Signs Even in the digital GPS age, banners can still easily draw attention to hard to find businesses. They hang well above head level for all people to see.
